g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the Observation Engine in RLM')
g.text: Ingests raw TimeSeries futures data — price, volume, OI, spread, session structure

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the Hypothesis Generator in RLM form trading hypotheses?')
g.text: LM reasons over observations → produces testable, falsifiable market hypotheses

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the RLM Experiment Designer work?')
g.text: Defines test window, control vars, entry/exit rules, and position sizing logic

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does RLM execute tests and collect data?')
g.text: Runs backtest or live paper trade — logs P&L, fill quality, drawdown, win rate

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the Analysis Engine evaluate hypothesis results in RLM?')
g.text: Statistical evaluation — significance testing, Sharpe, regime sensitivity, edge decay

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does RLM decide if a hypothesis is supported or rejected?')
g.text: LM interprets results → SUPPORTED / REJECTED / INCONCLUSIVE + confidence score

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the RLM Knowledge Store work?')
g.text: Persists all hypotheses, test configs, results, and verdicts for downstream retrieval

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the recursive feedback loop work in RLM?')
g.text: LM reads prior conclusions → refines or rejects hypotheses → spawns next generation

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What is the regime context layer in RLM?')
sendPrompt('What does the meta-learner do in RLM?')
sendPrompt('What are the guardrails in RLM?')
